title: rubus celtidifolius
intro: Rubus celtidifolius, also known as the hawthorn-like bramble, is a species of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Rubus celtidifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Rubus celtidifolius is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw fruit or used in jams and jellies.
